Description.value: Tightens Black Wolf better loot spawns ammo entries to create hand-to-mouth ammo economy in day 1-3. Per group: Small ~x0.25 count and prob -2 steps (guaranteed->low, low->veryLow). Medium ~x0.33 count and prob -1 step. Large ~x0.5 count and prob -1 step. Targets 9mm, 762, 44Magnum, Shotgun shells (Small/Medium/Large groups, 12 lootgroups). Pure XML, no DLL. Load order: must be after Black Wolf better loot spawns.
